results.justification: EXACT TWIN — ByteRover hierarchical context with LLM-curated multi-tier memory + cross-tier projection IS the TOMOL stacked tier + cross-tier sealant projection.
A-Mem agentic memory with episodic + semantic cross-tier integration covers the multi-tier modular memory + cross-tier access paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — MIRIX 6-component (Core+Episodic+Semantic+Procedural+Resource+KnowledgeVault) IS the TOMOL stacked tier composition; even more components than tomol's 3-4.
CoALA episodic/semantic/procedural/working framework IS the TOMOL-STACK 4-tier modular memory paradigm.
MemMachine personalized memory with cross-tier persistence covers the cross-tier yop-sealant persistence paradigm.
Anatomy of agentic memory + taxonomy covers the modular tier memory composition paradigm — functional saturation.
M2PA multi-memory planning agent for open worlds covers modular memory composition for agents.
EXACT TWIN — Multi-layered memory architectures with experimental evaluation IS the TOMOL 3-4 stacked tier memory architecture.
